live-like.label: Live-Like
live-like.description: Default raid behavior, balanced like live Tarkov.

quiet-raids.label: Quiet Raids
quiet-raids.description: Low bot presence, good for exploration or loot runs.

more-scavs.label: More Scavs
more-scavs.description: Heavier scav presence across the raid.

more-scavs-and-pmcs.label: More Scavs + PMCs
more-scavs-and-pmcs.description: Escalated raid chaos for both sides.

boss-invasion.label: Boss Invasion
boss-invasion.description: Main bosses roam multiple maps with increased chances.

rogue-invasion.label: Rogue Invasion
rogue-invasion.description: Rogues may appear anywhere with high chance.

raider-invasion.label: Raider Invasion
raider-invasion.description: Raider squads have taken over the map.

insanity.label: Insanity Mode
insanity.description: Maximum chaos with high wave counts, big groups, and all factions.

main-boss-roaming.label: Boss Roaming
main-boss-roaming.description: Main bosses can spawn in extra maps with boosted odds.

sniper-buddies.label: Sniper Buddies
sniper-buddies.description: Marksman bots now spawn in pairs with guaranteed grouping.

debug-empty.label: Debug: Empty Map
debug-empty.description: Disables most bot activity for spawn testing or benchmarking.
